span.p:
SQL owns ALL mutable state
runs, needsets, profiles, settings,
brands, billing, events, metrics,
cache, learning

span.p:
JSON written at pivotal moments
run completion snapshots,
S3 archival bundles,
export artifacts

Any JSON artifact
reconstructable from SQL

traffic_light.json, evidence_pack.json, candidates.json
